title: Skill Discovery, Trigger Descriptions, and Boundaries · Protocol Clinic: Negative Cases
summary: Make explicit and implicit invocation reliable without false positives. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext negative cases increment in a trigger evaluation dataset. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write adjacent prompts that must not activate the skill.
Write diverse prompts that should activate the skill.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
